title: Food+ by Flekt
description: Minecraft Vanilla+ resourcepack that adds over 50 foods to minecraft. For roleplay
body:
# Food+ 

![fooddevider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/889d79f4c36c17ec1f04fc4c786059383bc6e423.png)
![baked](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3b46b4436cfe913ed4b998e0623bb8e53c4504fa.png)

**Adds over 50+** new **foods** to minecraft
 by simply **renaming** the already existing ones 

 ![pancakes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/458efea8342668f8108153153e8ae25d7790b393.png)

 Food+ **requires Optifine** or [CIT-Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn)

 ![fruit](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a85c6d532b86407e77520be846bc66935bd2792a.png)
 
 ![sups](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/566a88ef031f2b2a7531d6c1b93015562f4b9bd0.png)

 ![recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/123eb6d9c344a2aae5c2377cd214b5fc97420e99.png)
